Providers nothing resolves stay out of the generated file.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Used struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewUsed() *Used { return &Used{} }

type Unused struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewUnused() *Unused { return &Unused{} }

type Handlers struct {
	Used *Used
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	webUsed := web.NewUsed()
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Used: webUsed,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
